_note: Community channels and contribution paths for one locale. The sibling .<other>.json holds the translation.

page.lede: Open forum, public issues, longer-form discussions. The modernization conversation does not happen behind a closed door.

channels.label: Velocity Discord
channels.blurb: An open forum for change makers. A feedback channel and a place for the modernization conversation to happen.

channels.label: GitHub Issues
channels.blurb: Bug reports, content corrections, French translation review, accessibility findings. Public.

channels.label: GitHub Discussions
channels.blurb: Longer-form questions about the methodology, the harness, the tooling. Public.

contributing.title: Contributing
contributing.body: The site is MIT-licensed and the content is openly published. Pull requests against the public repository are welcome. The contribution path: open an issue first to align on direction; submit a small, focused PR; pass the eval suite; cite sources for any new claim.
